title: vitis sylvestris subsp. trichophylla
intro: Vitis sylvestris subsp. trichophylla, also known as the wild grape or forest grape, is a subspecies of grapevine native to Europe and parts of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, derived from its leaves, bark, and fruit. The health benefits of Vitis sylvestris subsp. trichophylla include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Vitis sylvestris subsp. trichophylla include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, from digestive issues to skin conditions.
